title: Music Maker Mod Neoforge
description: Music Maker Mod adds music sheets, instruments and other devices to the game for creating and playing music. A PORTING FROM FABRIC
body:
THIS IS A PORTING OF THE MOD OF Music Maker Mod OF [XERCA](https://modrinth.com/user/xerca) TO NEOFORGE 1.21.1

Music Maker Mod adds music sheets, instruments and other devices to the game for creating and playing music. Check the video below to see how it works.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/Z-khO8YSXTc" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

GO AND LOOK AT THE [ORIGINAL MOD](https://modrinth.com/mod/music-maker-mod) FOR FULL DETAILS
